title: BoatLabs Mod
description: The official client-side mod for the BoatLabs server. Includes Time Trial ghosts and visible racing lines!
body:
![BoatLabs Mod Banner](https://cdn.boatlabs.net/images/modrinth_boatlabs_mod_banner.png)
 
 
##   ### 🛶 About the BoatLabs Mod
 
The **BoatLabs Mod** is the official client-side enhancement for competitive Minecraft ice boat racing, built specifically for the [BoatLabs](https://boatlabs.net/) server. ## ![What it looks like](https://cdn.boatlabs.net/images/modrnith_main_showcase_2.png) ## ### ⚙️ Key Features
 
- ⏱️ **Sub-tick accurate timing** for ultra-precise leaderboard results, without the risk of being reset due to network lag - 📈 **Personal best visualisation** - show your fastest run as either a line, a ghost, or both at the same time! - 🏁 **Checkpoint highlighting** - for helping you know where to go, or where your splits are updated - 💄 **Customisation** - *almost* everything can be customised via the settings menu, which can be found in this mod's ModMenu entry ## ![In action](https://cdn.boatlabs.net/images/modrnith_line_showcase.png) ## ### Credits & License BoatLabs Mod by **Pigalala** Feel free to use this mod in your Modrinth/Curseforge hosted modpacks without asking for permission. Do not redistribute the jar files anywhere else!
